---
title: "single_cell_transcriptomic_map_of_human_and_mouse_pancreas"
format: html
---

# Paper: https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC5228327/
# GEO: https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/query/acc.cgi?acc=GSE84133
# Github: https://github.com/shenorrLabTRDF/bseqsc

# Datasets stored in OneDrive
```{r, eval=FALSE}
# Change path as necessary
output_path = "C:/Users/ankit/OneDrive - Savitribai Phule Pune University/Paper_Replication/single_cell_transcriptomic_map_of_human_and_mouse_pancreas"
setwd(output_path)
```

```{r}
library(bseqsc)
```
